messages.content: how do i reset my password

It appears I do not have access to the password reset instructions file. Let me summarize the typical password reset process:

1. Go to the login page and click the "Forgot Password" or "Reset Password" link.
2. Enter the email address associated with your account.
3. Check your email for a password reset link and click it.
4. Follow the instructions to create a new password.

If you have any trouble with this process, please contact our support team directly. They will be able to assist you further.
